text.title: ProductionVoiceAgent and WebSocket Server
text.summary: ProductionVoiceAgent with AgentState machine, async handle_audio, tool calling, and FastAPI WebSocket endpoint.

section.title: State Machine
section.reference: ProductionVoiceAgent with state machine, tool support, session management
section.p: ProductionVoiceAgent uses an AgentState enum (IDLE, LISTENING, PROCESSING, SPEAKING) to prevent concurrent turn processing. The state is not protected by a lock — in multi-threaded contexts, wrap state transitions with threading.Lock or asyncio.Lock.

example.note: handle_audio ignoring audio when state == SPEAKING is correct barge-in prevention, but the client receives no feedback. Add a visual or audio indicator in the client UI.

section.title: Tool Calling Bug Fix
section.p: The default _generate_response makes a second LLM call unconditionally — it should only call LLM again after tool execution.

section.title: WebSocket Server
section.p: The FastAPI WebSocket endpoint receives audio bytes, passes them to agent.handle_audio(), and sends back response audio bytes. Use WebSocketDisconnect specifically in except clause — not bare Exception.

antipattern.description: Registering async def tool functions in the tool_functions dict.
antipattern.reason: ProductionVoiceAgent calls tool functions synchronously. Async functions return coroutine objects, not results. Use sync implementations or wrap with asyncio.run().
